name: Kaju Katli
description: Premium diamond-shaped Indian sweet made from cashew nuts, sugar, and cardamom powder. A classic Diwali favourite and wedding staple.

name: Kalakand
description: Rich, moist, and grainy milk sweet made with condensed milk and cottage cheese. Soft texture with a hint of cardamom.

name: Motichoor Laddu
description: Soft, tiny drops of besan (chickpea flour) deep fried in ghee, bound with sugar syrup. Melt-in-the-mouth perfection.

name: Mysore Pak
description: A Royal Karnataka delicacy made with pure ghee, besan and sugar. Melt-in-the-mouth with a rich, buttery flavour.
